name: Sweet-And-Sour Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 sweet green pepper, cut into ½-inch cubes
3/4 pound skinless boneless chicken breast, cut into strips
2 teaspoons cornstarch dissolved in 1 tablespoon water
2 cups cooked and chopped brown rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large nonstick skillet.
2. Add onion; sauté for 2 minutes.
3. Add pepper; sauté for an additional 3 minutes.
4. Increase heat to medium-high.
5. Stir in chicken pieces; cook until no longer pink in the center, about 5 minutes.
6. Stir in tomato, duck sauce, ketchup, vinegar, soy sauce, and cornstarch mixture.
7. Bring to a boil; cook, stirring occasionally, until thickened, about 1 minute.
8. To serve, spoon over rice.
